person.name: Bao Dang Kim
person.headline: Backend Engineer moving toward Product Owner / Product Manager roles
person.summary: Bao Dang Kim is a backend engineer based in Ho Chi Minh City with more than 5 years of hands-on experience in R&D and technical delivery. His recent work combines backend engineering, product planning, roadmap execution, and cross-functional alignment, with strong interest in fintech and AI products.
person.current_status: Interested in product-focused leadership roles and backend ownership roles where strategy, engineering, and delivery need to work together.
person.career_objective: Pivot into Product Owner or Product Manager roles while continuing to leverage strong backend engineering experience, especially in fintech and AI-driven products.

education.school: Vietnamese-German University / Frankfurt University of Applied Sciences
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (Dual degree)

management: Leadership for teams up to 10 people

working_style.collaboration_style: Bao works closely with leadership, product, and engineering teams to translate high-level vision into scoped deliverables, roadmap decisions, and shipped features.
working_style.communication_style: Direct, pragmatic, and focused on clarity, tradeoffs, and execution.
working_style.decision_making_style: He prefers maintainable technical foundations and cost-efficient delivery, especially when product direction and engineering constraints need to be balanced.
working_style.personality_summary: Bao tends to be people-oriented, high-agency, and naturally comfortable aligning teams around a shared direction. He usually combines friendly communication with a strong bias toward action and delivery.

target_roles: Head of Engineering in product-focused teams
industries_of_interest: Products that combine technical depth with business strategy
career_direction.vision_statement: Bao wants to become a product leader who can connect strategy, engineering depth, and execution discipline to build products with real business impact.
preferred_environment: A culture that values both execution and clarity
